summary: PMS iframe integration testing completed. All 12 test features verified. Backend endpoints /api/pms-app and /api/pms-plan3d working (9/9 pytest tests passed). Frontend PMSModule with iframe wrapper, toolbar, and embedded mode all functioning correctly.

issues: Console warning: iframe sandbox allows script escape (security consideration, not blocking)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/pms-app returns 200 status
Backend: GET /api/pms-app returns text/html content-type
Backend: /api/pms-app HTML has iframe detection script (embedded-mode class)
Backend: /api/pms-app HTML has CSS to hide topbar in embedded mode
Backend: GET /api/pms-plan3d returns 200 status
Backend: GET /api/pms-plan3d returns text/html content-type
Backend: /api/pms-app has navigation elements (Planning, Réservations, Check-in, Clients, Tarifs)
Backend: POST /api/pms-app returns 405 Method Not Allowed
Backend: POST /api/pms-plan3d returns 405 Method Not Allowed
Frontend: /pms route loads PMSModule component (data-testid='pms-module-container')
Frontend: PMS iframe loads correctly (data-testid='pms-iframe')
Frontend: Toolbar 'PMS Flowtym v2.3' text visible
Frontend: Refresh button present (data-testid='pms-refresh-btn')
Frontend: External link button present (data-testid='pms-external-btn')
Frontend: Fullscreen button present (data-testid='pms-fullscreen-btn')
Frontend: Topbar hidden in iframe (embedded mode working)
Frontend: SubNavigation NOT displayed on /pms (exact match)
Frontend: Operations mega menu contains Dashboard PMS link
Frontend: Dashboard PMS link navigates to /pms
Frontend: PMS internal navigation works (Planning, Reservations, Check-in/out, Clients, etc.)
Frontend: /housekeeping route still accessible
Frontend: /flowboard route still accessible
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: iframe sandbox attribute allows both allow-scripts and allow-same-origin which could be a security consideration (console warning)
seed_data_creation: None required - using existing hotel data
context_for_next_testing_agent: PMS iframe integration fully tested. PMSModule at /pms renders standalone PMS HTML in iframe with embedded mode (topbar hidden). Toolbar has refresh/external/fullscreen buttons. SubNavigation correctly hidden on /pms but shown on /pms/planning etc. Operations mega menu has Dashboard PMS link. Internal PMS navigation (Planning, Reservations, Check-in/out, Clients, Tarifs, etc.) works within iframe.

backend_endpoints./api/pms-app: Serves flowtym-pms.html with 200 status and text/html content-type
backend_endpoints./api/pms-plan3d: Serves plan3d.html with 200 status and text/html content-type

pms_html_features.iframe_detection: Script adds 'embedded-mode' class to html when in iframe
pms_html_features.internal_navigation: Planning, Reservations, Check-in/out, Clients, Groups & Séminaires, Simulation & Offres, Tarifs & Rate Plans, Rapports, Configuration

react_integration.toolbar: PMS Flowtym v2.3 label with refresh/external/fullscreen buttons
react_integration.layout: MainLayout removes p-6 padding on /pms route
react_integration.subnav: SubNavigation hidden on /pms exact, shown on /pms/* routes

operations_menu.mega_menu: 3 columns - PMS, Opérations Terrain, Achats & Conformité
